planSummary: Manual QA walkthrough of /branches list, create, edit, delete, employees dialog, and set-primary action.
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 with seeded 3-branch organization (Main Branch primary).

cases.text: Navigate to /branches. Expect 200 response, breadcrumbs, PageHeader, StatsGrid (Total/Active/Inactive/Main), FilterBar, DataTable, no console errors.
Select 'غير نشط' from status dropdown. Expect request with isActive=false and empty state (no inactive branches in seed).
Type 6 chars 'الرياض' into search box. Expect 1 request after debounce settle. Observed: 6 separate requests — no debounce implemented in use-branches hook.

cases.summary: Main badge renders only on primary branch row
cases.text: Inspect DataTable. Expect 'رئيسي' badge only on the row where isMain=true. Observed: Main Branch row shows the badge, others do not.

cases.summary: Row actions menu hides 'Set as primary' on the current main branch
cases.text: Open actions menu on the main branch row. Expect no 'تعيين كفرع رئيسي' item. Observed: menu contains only Employees/Edit/Disable/Delete.

On a non-main branch, click 'تعيين كفرع رئيسي'. Expect backend to set the old main to isMain=false in one transaction and the new branch to isMain=true. Observed: 409 rejection 'Another branch is already primary (الفرع الرئيسي). Unset it first.' — no swap, and the error message is in English.

Open 'الممارسون' on a branch. Expect two lists (assigned/available). Click '+ إضافة ممارسين' on an available employee, confirm the list updates to show the employee as assigned. Click 'إزالة من الفرع' to remove.

cases.summary: Create form — empty submit shows Arabic validation errors
cases.text: Navigate to /branches/create. Click 'إنشاء الفرع' with empty fields. Expect Arabic error messages under nameAr and nameEn. Observed: 'هذا الحقل مطلوب' on both fields.

cases.summary: Create form — successful submit and redirect
cases.text: Fill nameEn 'QA Test Branch', nameAr 'فرع اختبار QA', phone '501234567'. Click 'إنشاء الفرع'. Expect POST /dashboard/organization/branches 201 and redirect to /branches. Observed: redirected, new row present, StatsGrid total 4, phone rendered ltr as '+966501234567'.
Navigate to /branches/{id}/edit. Expect all fields prefilled. Observed: nameEn/nameAr, timezone, phone all prefilled correctly.

cases.summary: Delete dialog shows branch name in description
cases.text: Click delete action on a row. Expect dialog description to include the branch name. Observed: 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف الفرع فرع اختبار QA؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.'.

cases.summary: Delete removes the row and updates StatsGrid
cases.text: Confirm delete. Expect 204 response, row removed, StatsGrid total decremented. Observed: row gone, total back to 3.

cases.summary: Create/Edit form card headings are titled, not field-labelled
cases.text: Inspect h2 headings on form cards. Expect titles like 'الأسماء', 'الإعدادات', 'معلومات الاتصال'. Observed: h2 renders the first field's label ('الاسم (EN)', 'نشط', 'العنوان') — the form is passing wrong data into the CardTitle slot.
